scripts.build:js: npx terser ../frontend/js/api.js -o ../frontend/js/api.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser ../frontend/js/auth.js -o ../frontend/js/auth.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser ../frontend/js/dashboard.js -o ../frontend/js/dashboard.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser ../frontend/js/team.js -o ../frontend/js/team.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser ../frontend/js/match.js -o ../frontend/js/match.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser ../frontend/js/market.js -o ../frontend/js/market.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser ../frontend/js/leaderboard.js -o ../frontend/js/leaderboard.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser ../frontend/js/app.js -o ../frontend/js/app.min.js --compress --mangle && npx terser ../frontend/js/sound.js -o ../frontend/js/sound.min.js --compress --mangle
scripts.build: npm run build:js && npm run build:css
